title: OSHA Construction Standards
description: Comply with OSHA 29 CFR 1926 construction industry standards.

title: Fall Protection Required
description: Provide fall protection at heights of 6 feet or more in construction.

title: Hazard Communication Standard
description: Maintain hazard communication program with SDS, labels, and training.

title: Personal Protective Equipment
description: Provide and require PPE per hazard assessment in construction operations.

title: Scaffolding Safety
description: Erect, use, and dismantle scaffolds per OSHA Subpart L requirements.

title: Electrical Safety
description: Maintain electrical safety per OSHA Subpart K with GFCI and assured grounding.

title: Excavation and Trenching
description: Apply OSHA excavation standards including protective systems for >5ft trenches.

title: Confined Space Entry
description: Apply OSHA confined space standards in construction environments.

title: Crane Operator Certification
description: Use certified crane operators per OSHA Subpart CC.

title: Respirable Crystalline Silica
description: Limit silica exposure per PEL with engineering controls and respirators.

title: Lead Exposure Construction
description: Apply OSHA lead in construction standard for renovation and demolition.

title: Asbestos in Construction
description: Comply with OSHA asbestos in construction standard for any potential exposure.

title: OSHA 300 Log
description: Maintain OSHA 300 Log of work-related injuries and illnesses.

title: OSHA Training Requirements
description: Provide OSHA-required training including 10/30-hour outreach where required.

title: Severe Injury Reporting
description: Report fatalities within 8 hours and severe injuries within 24 hours to OSHA.

title: Occupational H&S Management System
description: Establish OHSMS per ISO 45001 with management commitment and worker participation.

title: Hazard Identification Process
description: Establish ongoing process for hazard identification and risk assessment.

title: Incident Investigation
description: Investigate incidents to identify causes and improve OHSMS.

title: Construction Stormwater Permit
description: Obtain NPDES stormwater permit for construction activities >1 acre.

title: SWPPP Implementation
description: Develop and implement Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan with BMPs.

title: Lead Renovation Repair Painting
description: Apply RRP rule for renovation in pre-1978 housing and child-occupied facilities.

title: NESHAP Asbestos Demolition
description: Comply with NESHAP for asbestos in demolition and renovation.

title: Construction Waste Management
description: Manage construction and demolition waste per RCRA Subtitle D state programs.

title: Section 404 Wetlands Permit
description: Obtain Clean Water Act Section 404 permit for dredge/fill in wetlands.

title: Endangered Species Compliance
description: Consult Fish and Wildlife Service for projects affecting listed species per ESA Section 7.

title: Diesel Engine Emissions
description: Comply with EPA Tier 4 emissions standards for non-road diesel engines.

title: ADA Standards for Accessible Design
description: Apply 2010 ADA Standards to commercial construction and renovation projects.

title: ADA Title II for Public Construction
description: Apply ADA Title II to state/local govt construction projects.

title: Architectural Barriers Act
description: Apply ABA standards to federally funded construction projects.

title: Fair Housing Act Design and Construction
description: Apply FHA design and construction requirements to multifamily dwellings.

title: BIM ISO 19650 Information Management
description: Apply ISO 19650 information management for BIM projects.

title: Common Data Environment
description: Establish CDE for BIM project information per ISO 19650.

title: Davis-Bacon Prevailing Wages
description: Pay prevailing wages on federally funded construction over $2,000.

title: Certified Payroll Submission
description: Submit weekly certified payroll for Davis-Bacon covered projects.

title: Buy American Act Compliance
description: Use domestic construction materials per Buy American Act for federal projects.

title: Build America Buy America
description: Apply BABAA preference for iron, steel, and manufactured products in federally funded infrastructure.

title: Federal Acquisition Regulation
description: Comply with FAR clauses applicable to federal construction contracts.

title: Subcontracting Plan
description: Submit small business subcontracting plan for federal contracts >$750K.

title: SAM.gov Verification
description: Verify subcontractors not on SAM.gov exclusions list for federal projects.

title: Equal Pay Act Compliance
description: Pay equal wages for substantially equal work per Equal Pay Act.

title: Age Discrimination Compliance
description: Avoid age discrimination per ADEA in construction hiring and promotion.

title: Title VII Non-Discrimination
description: Avoid discrimination in construction employment per Title VII.

title: EEO-1 Reporting
description: Submit annual EEO-1 component 1 demographic data for covered employers.

title: VEVRAA Veterans Compliance
description: Apply VEVRAA affirmative action for protected veterans on federal contracts.

title: Section 503 Disability AAP
description: Implement Section 503 affirmative action for individuals with disabilities.

title: DOT Drug and Alcohol Testing
description: Apply DOT drug and alcohol testing for safety-sensitive construction transportation.

title: FMCSA Commercial Driver Compliance
description: Comply with FMCSA hours of service for commercial drivers on construction projects.

title: BOMA Building Measurement Standards
description: Apply BOMA office area measurement standards for commercial real estate.

title: LEED Certification Compliance
description: Apply USGBC LEED certification requirements for sustainable building projects.

title: ASHRAE 90.1 Energy Standard
description: Comply with ASHRAE 90.1 energy standard for new commercial construction.

title: International Building Code
description: Comply with state-adopted IBC for commercial construction.

title: International Residential Code
description: Comply with state-adopted IRC for residential construction.

title: NFPA Fire Code Compliance
description: Comply with NFPA fire codes for fire protection systems and life safety.

title: National Electrical Code
description: Comply with NFPA 70 National Electrical Code for electrical installations.

title: ASCE 7 Wind and Seismic Loads
description: Apply ASCE 7 minimum design loads for wind, seismic, and snow.

title: AISC Steel Construction
description: Apply AISC 360 specification for structural steel buildings.

title: ACI 318 Building Code Concrete
description: Apply ACI 318 building code requirements for structural concrete.

title: ASTM Material Standards
description: Verify construction materials meet applicable ASTM specifications.

title: Lawful Basis for Personal Data
description: Document lawful basis for processing personal data of EU customers and workers.

title: DSAR Response Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: Construction ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for project management systems and customer/worker data.

title: BIM Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 encryption to BIM project data with sensitive intellectual property.

title: State Mechanic Lien Compliance
description: Comply with state-specific mechanic lien notice and filing requirements.

title: Miller Act Bonds
description: Provide payment and performance bonds for federal construction over $150,000.

title: State Little Miller Acts
description: Provide bonds for state and local public construction per state Little Miller Acts.

title: General Liability Insurance
description: Maintain CGL insurance with appropriate limits for construction operations.

title: Workers' Compensation Coverage
description: Maintain workers' compensation coverage per state requirements.

title: Builders Risk Insurance
description: Maintain builders risk insurance during construction per contract requirements.

title: Drug-Free Workplace Act
description: Maintain drug-free workplace per Drug-Free Workplace Act for federal contractors.

title: Level of Development Specification
description: Apply LOD specification for BIM model element development per BIM Forum.

title: Energy Star Certified Products
description: Specify Energy Star certified products where required for federal projects.

title: FEMA Flood Compliance
description: Comply with FEMA flood hazard regulations for construction in SFHA.

title: ADA Title III Public Accommodations
description: Apply ADA Title III to commercial construction for public accommodation.

title: Disadvantaged Business Enterprise
description: Apply DBE participation goals on federally funded transportation projects.

title: Minority/Women Business Enterprise
description: Apply state and local MBE/WBE goals on public projects.

title: E-Verify Compliance
description: Use E-Verify for employees on federal contracts with FAR E-Verify clause.

title: I-9 Employment Eligibility
description: Complete and retain Form I-9 for all employees per IRCA.

title: FLSA Wage and Hour
description: Comply with FLSA minimum wage, overtime, and recordkeeping for construction workers.

title: Worker Classification
description: Properly classify construction workers as employees vs independent contractors.

title: NLRA Compliance
description: Respect concerted activity protections per National Labor Relations Act.

title: Risk Management Plan
description: Submit RMP for facilities with threshold quantities of regulated substances.

title: Spill Prevention Control Countermeasures
description: Develop SPCC plan for facilities with oil storage above threshold.

title: Heat Illness Prevention
description: Apply state heat illness prevention rules (e.g., CA Title 8 Section 3395).

title: Daily Crane Inspections
description: Conduct daily crane inspections before each shift per OSHA.

title: Rigging Equipment Inspection
description: Inspect rigging equipment before each shift and tag damaged equipment.

title: Pre-Demolition Survey
description: Conduct engineering survey before demolition operations.

title: Hot Work Permit
description: Issue hot work permit and prevent fire from welding/cutting operations.

title: LOTO Energy Control
description: Implement lockout/tagout for hazardous energy control.

title: Bloodborne Pathogens for First Aid
description: Apply bloodborne pathogens standard for designated first aid responders.

title: Hearing Conservation Program
description: Implement hearing conservation when noise exceeds 85 dBA TWA.

title: Respiratory Protection Program
description: Implement respiratory protection program for required respirator use.

title: Federal Heat Stress Standard
description: Apply OSHA heat injury and illness prevention standard when finalized.

title: PFAS Reporting
description: Report PFAS use per EPA TSCA Section 8(a)(7) where applicable.

title: COBie Asset Information Delivery
description: Deliver COBie asset information for facility management handover.

title: EU Construction Products Regulation
description: Affix CE marking to construction products under harmonized standards in EU.

title: Construction Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance for project management and BIM data protection.

title: Construction Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for construction operations continuity per ISO 22301.
